scripts.build:design-spec: tsx design-spec/tools/cli/validate-spec.ts && tsx design-spec/tools/cli/bundle-spec.ts && tsx design-spec/tools/cli/analyze-spec.ts && tsx design-spec/tools/cli/generate-typescript-spec.ts && tsx design-spec/tools/cli/generate-business-diagrams.ts && tsx design-spec/tools/cli/generate-business-viewer.ts
scripts.verify:design-spec: npm run build:design-spec && npx -y -p typescript tsc --noEmit
scripts.dev:design-spec-viewer: npm run build:design-spec && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer install --no-fund --no-audit && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer run dev --
